intended_use: The system is a diagnostic ultrasound imaging system used by qualified and trained healthcare professionals for ultrasound imaging, human body fluid flow analysis and puncture and biopsy guidance.
intended_use_full: The system is a diagnostic ultrasound imaging system used by qualified and trained healthcare professionals for ultrasound imaging, human body fluid flow analysis and puncture and biopsy guidance.
ground_truth: Manual caliper placement by clinical personnel with average of approximately 15 years' experience in ultrasound, using freeware tool developed by the Oxford Imaging Group
other_metrics: For transducer 9018: automatic initial caliper placement deviated 11% +/- 6% compared to manual placement. For transducer 9048: automatic initial caliper placement expected to deviate 7% +/- 15% compared to manual placement. Segmentation algorithm tested using standard metric of similarity and passed.

recalls.reason: GE HealthCare has become aware that the Instructions for Use within the user guide and service manual do not adequately state the required battery replacement intervals, end-of-life handling procedures, or general battery safety precautions.
recalls.product_description: Ultrasound System 1300, bkSpecto w/battery; Model No. 1300-21 or 1300-S1; System, Imaging, Pulsed Doppler, Ultrasonic
